principles.rule: Every major object must be sized against a walking body, not against the Quake grid alone.
principles.failure_predicate: A ward, AoA, or room dimension is chosen without an explicit media legibility, passage, or viewing-distance reason.

principles.rule: Ward clusters require negative-space intervals so the viewer can recover orientation before the next stimulus.
principles.failure_predicate: A station view contains more major objects than can be named, or the path gives no empty interval between dense clusters.

principles.rule: The recurrent path must reveal wards by oblique approach, partial occlusion, and pause stations, not by a frontal wall reveal.
principles.failure_predicate: A camera station presents the room as a flat theater or exposes every ward at once.

principles.rule: Far walls, side groves, and off-axis media must act as borrowed scenery that enlarges the room without confusing the current task.
principles.failure_predicate: Background detail competes with the current ward or erases near/mid/far depth.

principles.rule: Live media mounts must preserve a deterministic texture-to-surface contract and occupy enough visual angle for recognition.
principles.failure_predicate: A live media ward is present but its content cannot be identified from a normal path station screenshot.

principles.rule: Camera and YouTube surfaces are spatial objects in the Screwm, not a fourth-wall performer window.
principles.failure_predicate: The streamer face becomes the central stable subject by default, or the scene collapses into a flat livestream layout.

principles.rule: Camera and effect motion must be slow enough for critiqueable OBS screenshots and fast enough to sustain a living room.
principles.failure_predicate: A screenshot cannot be repeated from the same station, or lighting/camera pulses produce unexplained jumps every few seconds.

principles.rule: Darkness must be structured by legible luminance contrast: media and task objects lead, atmosphere recedes, and texture never erases contour.
principles.failure_predicate: A media surface, path edge, or AoA boundary is present but visually collapses into the room background from an OBS screenshot.

principles.rule: Visual dynamics must reserve future aural roles: foreground, midground, ambience, masking, and spatial release should have matching visual positions.
principles.failure_predicate: Multiple dynamic effects compete at the same apparent distance, frequency, and intensity with no clear source hierarchy.

witness_requirements: OBS source screenshot after every material ward/layout change.
At least one intentional AoA station screenshot with the sphere visible.
At least one close camera-ward screenshot per camera source before layout approval.
At least one wide room screenshot proving no-front spatial orientation and negative space.
